tasks.name: BEDPM0 slice (code)
tasks.description: Implement distro detection, distro-family mapping, and stable decision-line reporting.
acceptance_criteria: Implements the behaviors required by the BEDPM0 AC IDs in the slice spec.
Keeps the work inside the BEDPM0 boundary.
start_checklist: git checkout feat/best-effort-distro-package-manager && git pull --ff-only
Read plan.md, tasks.json, session_log.md, BEDPM0-spec.md, and the kickoff prompt
Set status to in_progress; add START entry; commit docs
Run: make triad-task-start-pair FEATURE_DIR="docs/project_management/packs/draft/best-effort-distro-package-manager" SLICE_ID="BEDPM0"
end_checklist: Run a slice-relevant baseline installer command before and after edits; capture the outputs
cargo fmt
cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings
From inside the worktree: make triad-task-finish TASK_ID="BEDPM0-code"
Update tasks/session_log on orchestration branch; do not delete worktrees

tasks.name: BEDPM0 slice (test)
tasks.description: Add or extend tests for distro detection, mapping, and single-line reporting behavior.
acceptance_criteria: Adds or updates tests that enforce the BEDPM0 AC IDs.
Keeps coverage deterministic and scoped to installer behavior.
start_checklist: git checkout feat/best-effort-distro-package-manager && git pull --ff-only
Read plan.md, tasks.json, session_log.md, BEDPM0-spec.md, and the kickoff prompt
Set status to in_progress; add START entry; commit docs
Run: make triad-task-start-pair FEATURE_DIR="docs/project_management/packs/draft/best-effort-distro-package-manager" SLICE_ID="BEDPM0"
end_checklist: cargo fmt
Run the targeted tests you add or touch
From inside the worktree: make triad-task-finish TASK_ID="BEDPM0-test"
Update tasks/session_log on orchestration branch; do not delete worktrees

tasks.name: BEDPM0 slice (integration)

tasks.name: BEDPM3 slice (integration core)
tasks.description: Merge BEDPM3 code and tests, make the slice green locally, and prepare the checkpoint SHA.
acceptance_criteria: Local integration gates are green for BEDPM3.
The core integration branch is ready for CP1 compile parity, CI Testing quick, and Linux behavior smoke.
start_checklist: git checkout feat/best-effort-distro-package-manager && git pull --ff-only
Read plan.md, tasks.json, session_log.md, BEDPM3-spec.md, and the kickoff prompt
Set status to in_progress; add START entry; commit docs
Run: make triad-task-start FEATURE_DIR="docs/project_management/packs/draft/best-effort-distro-package-manager" TASK_ID="BEDPM3-integ-core"
end_checklist: cargo fmt
cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings
Run relevant tests
bash "docs/project_management/packs/draft/best-effort-distro-package-manager/smoke/linux-smoke.sh"
make integ-checks
On the orchestration branch, run checkpoint task: CP1-ci-checkpoint
From inside the worktree: make triad-task-finish TASK_ID="BEDPM3-integ-core"
Update tasks/session_log on orchestration branch; do not delete worktrees

tasks.name: CP1 CI checkpoint (cross-platform validation)
tasks.description: Run compile parity, CI Testing quick, and Linux behavior smoke for the BEDPM3 checkpoint boundary.
acceptance_criteria: CI audit evidence is recorded for the checkpoint.
Compile parity is green for the BEDPM3 core integration SHA.
CI Testing quick is green for the BEDPM3 core integration SHA.
Linux behavior smoke is green for the BEDPM3 core integration SHA.
start_checklist: git checkout feat/best-effort-distro-package-manager && git pull --ff-only
Read ci_checkpoint_plan.md, tasks.json, session_log.md, and the kickoff prompt
Set status to in_progress; add START entry; commit docs
end_checklist: Run ci_audit for ci-testing and feature-smoke; record the audit output lines in session_log.md
Dispatch compile parity, CI Testing quick, and Linux behavior smoke; record run ids and URLs
Set status to completed; add END entry; commit docs

tasks.name: BEDPM3 slice (integration linux)
tasks.description: Resolve Linux behavior-smoke failures for BEDPM3 after CP1 when fixes are required.
acceptance_criteria: Linux behavior smoke is green for BEDPM3 on the platform-fix branch.
Any Linux-specific fixes stay scoped to BEDPM3 validation behavior.
start_checklist: Run on a Linux host when available
git checkout feat/best-effort-distro-package-manager && git pull --ff-only
Read plan.md, tasks.json, session_log.md, BEDPM3-spec.md, and the kickoff prompt
Set status to in_progress; add START entry; commit docs
Run: make triad-task-start FEATURE_DIR="docs/project_management/packs/draft/best-effort-distro-package-manager" TASK_ID="BEDPM3-integ-linux"
end_checklist: cargo fmt
cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings
bash "docs/project_management/packs/draft/best-effort-distro-package-manager/smoke/linux-smoke.sh"

make feature-smoke FEATURE_DIR="docs/project_management/packs/draft/best-effort-distro-package-manager" PLATFORM=linux SMOKE_SLICE_ID="BEDPM3" RUNNER_KIND=self-hosted WORKFLOW_REF="feat/best-effort-distro-package-manager" REMOTE=origin CLEANUP=1 RUN_INTEG_CHECKS=1
From inside the worktree: make triad-task-finish TASK_ID="BEDPM3-integ-linux"
Hand off the run id or ci_audit skip evidence to the operator

The merged state satisfies the BEDPM3 AC IDs and is ready to merge back to orchestration.

Read plan.md, tasks.json, session_log.md, BEDPM3-spec.md, and the kickoff prompt

tasks.name: Feature cleanup (worktrees and branches)
tasks.description: Remove retained task worktrees and close out the automation registry for this feature.
acceptance_criteria: All task worktrees for this feature are removed or explicitly left in place by operator decision.
Local task branches are pruned after the feature is fully merged.
session_log.md records the cleanup summary.
start_checklist: git checkout feat/best-effort-distro-package-manager && git pull --ff-only
Confirm all feature tasks are completed and merged as intended
Set status to in_progress; add START entry; commit docs
end_checklist: Run: make triad-feature-cleanup FEATURE_DIR="docs/project_management/packs/draft/best-effort-distro-package-manager" DRY_RUN=1 REMOVE_WORKTREES=1 PRUNE_LOCAL=1
Then run: make triad-feature-cleanup FEATURE_DIR="docs/project_management/packs/draft/best-effort-distro-package-manager" REMOVE_WORKTREES=1 PRUNE_LOCAL=1
Set status to completed; add END entry with the script summary; commit docs
